properties.verseOrder: V1 V2 V1 V3 V4 V5

verse.name: V1
verse.lines: This is my desire To honor You Lord, with all my heart I worship You All I have within me I give You praise All that I adore Is in You

verse.name: V2
verse.lines: Lord, I give You my heart I give You my soul I live for you alone And every breath that I take Every moment I'm awake Lord, have Your ways in me

verse.name: V3
verse.lines: Lord, I give You my heart I give You my soul I live for you alone Every breath that I take Every moment I'm awake Lord, have Your ways in me

verse.name: V4
verse.lines: And I will live And I will live for You And I will live And I will live for You Oh and I will live And I will live And I will live for You

verse.name: V5
verse.lines: Lord, I give You my heart I give You my soul, I live for You alone Every breath that I take, every moment I'm awake Lord, have Your way in me Have Your way Have Your way, have Your way
